mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.subject, m.sent_at, m.has_attachments, m.is_remote, m.remote_sender_email, s.email AS sender_email, s.username AS sender_username, r.email AS receiver_email, r.username AS receiver_username, COALESCE(f.is_read, 0) AS is_read, COALESCE(f.is_starred, 0) AS is_starred, COALESCE(f.is_important, 0) AS is_important FROM mails m LEFT JOIN users s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users r ON m.receiver_id = r.id LEFT JOIN mail_flags f ON f.mail_id = m.id AND f.user_id = #{userId} WHERE m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(f.is_important, 0) DESC, m.sent_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mails WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND receiver_deleted = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT m.id, m.subject, m.sent_at, m.has_attachments, m.is_remote, m.remote_sender_email, s.email AS sender_email, s.username AS sender_username, COALESCE(r.email, m.remote_sender_email) AS receiver_email, r.username AS receiver_username, COALESCE(f.is_read, 0) AS is_read, COALESCE(f.is_starred, 0) AS is_starred, COALESCE(f.is_important, 0) AS is_important FROM mails m LEFT JOIN users s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users r ON m.receiver_id = r.id LEFT JOIN mail_flags f ON f.mail_id = m.id AND f.user_id = #{userId} WHERE m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.sender_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(f.is_important, 0) DESC, m.sent_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mails WHERE sender_id = #{userId} AND sender_deleted = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT m.id, m.subject, m.created_at AS sent_at, m.has_attachments, m.is_remote, m.remote_sender_email, s.email AS sender_email, s.username AS sender_username, r.email AS receiver_email, r.username AS receiver_username, 0 AS is_read, 0 AS is_starred, 0 AS is_important FROM mails m LEFT JOIN users s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users r ON m.receiver_id = r.id WHERE m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.sender_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 0 ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mails WHERE sender_id = #{userId} AND sender_deleted = 0 AND status = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mails (sender_id, receiver_id, subject, content, status, sender_deleted, receiver_deleted, created_at, sent_at, has_attachments, is_remote, sender_server, remote_sender_email) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{status}, 0, 0, NOW(), #{sentAt}, 0, #{remote}, #{senderServer}, #{remoteSenderEmail})
mapper.update: UPDATE mails SET subject = #{subject}, content = #{content}, receiver_id = #{receiverId} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
UPDATE mails SET status = 1, sent_at = #{sentAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mails SET sender_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND sender_id = #{userId}
UPDATE mails SET receiver_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND receiver_id = #{userId}
UPDATE mails SET has_attachments = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mails SET has_attachments = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mails SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mails SET sent_at = #{sentAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mails WHERE status = 2 AND is_remote = 1 AND sent_at IS NULL

SELECT m.id, m.subject, m.sent_at, m.has_attachments, m.is_remote, m.remote_sender_email, s.email AS sender_email, s.username AS sender_username, r.email AS receiver_email, r.username AS receiver_username, COALESCE(f.is_read, 0) AS is_read, COALESCE(f.is_starred, 0) AS is_starred, COALESCE(f.is_important, 0) AS is_important FROM mails m LEFT JOIN users s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users r ON m.receiver_id = r.id LEFT JOIN mail_flags f ON f.mail_id = m.id AND f.user_id = #{userId}
m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1
m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.sender_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1
m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.sender_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 0
( (m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1) OR (m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.sender_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1) )
AND m.subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND m.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (m.subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND (s.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.remote_sender_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND (r.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY COALESCE(f.is_important, 0) DESC, m.sent_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mails m LEFT JOIN users s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users r ON m.receiver_id = r.id
m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1
m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.sender_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1
m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.sender_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 0
( (m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1) OR (m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.sender_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1) )
AND m.subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND m.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (m.subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND (s.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.remote_sender_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND (r.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
